title: centaurea × sudrei
intro: Centaurea × sudrei, also known as Centaurea x sudrei or Centaurea montana x Centaurea nigra, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family. It is a perennial flowering plant, which is often used for its medicinal properties due to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Centaurea × sudrei is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and it is also used in some herbal remedies, such as salves and ointments, to promote wound healing and skin health.
